debug_info.goal:
case h.right
Hist : History
L R : List Formula
nlf : NegLoadFormula
nbas : ¬Sequent.basic (L, R, some (Sum.inl nlf))
lt : LocalTableau (L, R, some (Sum.inl nlf))
nrep : ¬rep Hist (L, R, some (Sum.inl nlf))
next : (Y : Sequent) → Y ∈ endNodesOf lt → Tableau ((L, R, some (Sum.inl nlf)) :: Hist) Y
LY RY : List Formula
nlfY : NegLoadFormula
Y_in : (LY, RY, some (Sum.inr nlfY)) ∈ endNodesOf lt.flip.flip
Yf_in : Sequent.flip (LY, RY, some (Sum.inr nlfY)) ∈ endNodesOf lt.flip
e : PathIn (next (LY, RY, some (Sum.inr nlfY)) ⋯).flip
e_in :
  e ∈
    exitsOf
      ((R, L, some (Sum.inr nlf)) ::
        List.map
          (fun x =>
            match x with
            | (L, R, O) => (R, L, Option.map Sum.swap O))
          Hist)
      (RY, LY, some (Sum.inl nlfY)) (next (LY, RY, some (Sum.inr nlfY)) ⋯).flip
this : (LY, RY, some (Sum.inr nlfY)) ∈ endNodesOf lt
⊢ PathIn.loc ⋯ (⋯ ▸ e.flip) = ⋯ ▸ (PathIn.loc ⋯ e).flip
